title: Offline Circles Mesh
tagline: Mesh-relay Circles chat that survives network blackouts.
summary: Make Circles conversations work over Bluetooth and Wi-Fi mesh when the public internet is unavailable, syncing state when peers reconnect.
description: When network access drops — protests, blackouts, censored regions — Circles members lose the ability to coordinate. An offline mesh transport would relay Waku messages over short-range radios between nearby members, queue and dedupe state, and reconcile with the public network on reconnect. Reference: Bridgefy and Briar layered onto the Logos Circles model with end-to-end encryption preserved.
